requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: No mature, product-specific South Sudan EMC approval route for solar PV inverters has been identified. In practice, donor-funded, utility, mini-grid, and commercial PV projects should expect IEC-based EMC evidence, especially IEC 62920 for PV power-conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emission / immunity and harmonic current tests. Because South Sudan has very low electrification and many diesel/off-grid or weak-grid systems, EMC evidence should be paired with project-level assessment of harmonics, generator interaction, communications immunity, and installation earthing.
summary.zh: 目前未识别到南苏丹针对太阳能光伏逆变器的成熟产品专项EMC批准路径。实践中，捐助方资助、公用事业、微电网和商业光伏项目应预计需要IEC EMC证据，尤其是适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射/抗扰度和谐波电流测试。鉴于南苏丹电气化率很低，且存在大量柴油/离网或弱电网系统，EMC证据应结合谐波、发电机相互作用、通信抗扰度和安装接地的项目级评估。
summary.zht: 目前未識別到南蘇丹針對太陽能光伏逆變器的成熟產品專項EMC批准路徑。實務中，捐助方資助、公用事業、微電網和商業光伏項目應預計需要IEC EMC證據，尤其是適用於光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射/抗擾度和諧波電流測試。鑑於南蘇丹電氣化率很低，且存在大量柴油/離網或弱電網系統，EMC證據應結合諧波、發電機相互作用、通訊抗擾度和安裝接地的項目級評估。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, harmonic, and voltage fluctuation test methods as applicable
Project-owner, donor-lender, EPC, or utility EMC specifications for South Sudan PV, mini-grid, and diesel-hybrid projects

summary.en: China-side PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly packaged under GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and laboratory reports from CNAS-accredited facilities. Those reports may reference IEC 61000-family methods, but the test scope, voltage setup, acceptance criteria, and documentation format may not match IEC 62920 or the project owner's South Sudan requirements. China EMC documentation should therefore be mapped clause-by-clause rather than assumed equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器EMC证据通常按GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004以及CNAS认可实验室报告打包。此类报告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但测试范围、电压设置、判定准则和文件格式可能不符合IEC 62920或南苏丹项目业主要求。因此，中国EMC文件应逐条映射，而不能假定等效。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器EMC證據通常按GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004以及CNAS認可實驗室報告打包。此類報告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但測試範圍、電壓設定、判定準則和文件格式可能不符合IEC 62920或南蘇丹項目業主要求。因此，中國EMC文件應逐條映射，而不能假定等效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
CNAS-accredited China laboratory EMC reports using domestic or IEC-derived test methods

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports do not automatically satisfy South Sudan project requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, note whether tests were performed at 220/380 V or 230/400 V, and ask the SSEC/project engineer whether harmonics or immunity tests must be repeated under the South Sudan configuration. Diesel-hybrid and weak-grid projects should include harmonic and generator-interaction review.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC报告不会自动满足南苏丹项目要求。出口商应提供适用于确切逆变器型号的IEC 62920和相关IEC 61000报告，注明测试是在220/380 V还是230/400 V下进行，并向SSEC/项目工程师确认谐波或抗扰度测试是否须按南苏丹配置重做。柴油混合和弱电网项目应包括谐波及发电机相互作用审查。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC報告不會自動滿足南蘇丹項目要求。出口商應提供適用於確切逆變器型號的IEC 62920和相關IEC 61000報告，註明測試是在220/380 V還是230/400 V下進行，並向SSEC/項目工程師確認諧波或抗擾度測試是否須按南蘇丹配置重做。柴油混合和弱電網項目應包括諧波及發電機相互作用審查。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; typically required by donor, EPC, SSEC, mini-grid, or commercial procurement specifications even where national EMC enforcement capacity is limited
mandatory_status.cn: China-side EMC evidence supports domestic voluntary certification or procurement but is not an automatic South Sudan acceptance route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the inverter model and map any China GB/T EMC reports carefully. Confirm test voltage, harmonic limits, weak-grid assumptions, and diesel-hybrid interaction with the South Sudan project engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 为逆变器型号提供IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000 EMC证据，并谨慎映射任何中国GB/T EMC报告。出货前与南苏丹项目工程师确认测试电压、谐波限值、弱电网假设和柴油混合相互作用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 為逆變器型號提供IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000 EMC證據，並謹慎映射任何中國GB/T EMC報告。出貨前與南蘇丹項目工程師確認測試電壓、諧波限值、弱電網假設和柴油混合相互作用。
